explanations.1: This tells the build system to use the standard .NET SDK, which provides all the tools needed to compile a C# project.
explanations.4: OutputType=Exe means this project will compile into a standalone executable program that can be run directly.
explanations.6: ImplicitUsings=enable automatically includes common namespaces like System, so you don't have to write 'using System;' at the top of every file.
explanations.7: Nullable=enable enforces strict null checking, which means the compiler will warn you if you might accidentally use a variable that could be null.
explanations.11: This downloads and adds the Oracle database library as a dependency, so your code can connect to Oracle databases.
